description: Manage TidyCal scheduling data: bookings, contacts, booking types, team calendars, schedule briefs, triage, and availability shortlists.

novel_features.name: Schedule brief
novel_features.description: Produce a contact-aware schedule brief for a day or date range.

novel_features.name: Schedule triage
novel_features.description: Identify booking problems such as missing meeting URLs, duplicate contacts, off-hours bookings, cancelled bookings, and incomplete contact data.

novel_features.name: Availability shortlist
novel_features.description: Fetch available TidyCal timeslots for a booking type and rank a paste-ready shortlist by date window, timezone, preference, and weekend policy.

novel_features.name: Follow-up queue
novel_features.description: Create an AI-ready follow-up queue from recent bookings without sending messages or notifications.

novel_features.name: Assisted booking
novel_features.description: Book on behalf of a contact through an inspectable dry-run and explicit confirmation gate.

catalog_description: Manage TidyCal scheduling data: bookings, contacts, booking types, team calendars, schedule briefs, triage, and availability shortlists.
